for Dereham 28 April 2026 Towns like Dereham cannot keep having new homes built without additional investment in local facilities, services and infrastructure, especially health and care services. Image George Freeman calls for an end to the Government’s policy of massive subsidised solar “farm” power stations on agricultural land 14 April 2026 George Freeman calls for an end to the Government’s policy of massive subsidised solar “farm” power stations on agricultural land and switching to solar panels on rooftops, roads, motorway sidings, reservoirs & industrial sites instead of farmland. George Freeman fights for rural communities facing heating oil price hikes 11 March 2026 Fuel suppliers in Norfolk are cancelling orders for domestic heating oil in response to the Middle East crisis, raising concerns that rural households could be left without fuel. Image Children of Alcoholics Week 2026 14 February 2026 George Freeman hosts a meeting of the All-Party Parliamentary Group on Children of Alcoholics. UK now a pion­eer in plant breed­ing: Don’t ruin it, Keir! 8 February 2026 Published in the Sunday Express Sir Keir Starmer must stand firm against the EU when it comes to post-brexit free­dom to develop gene-edited crops banned by Euro­crats, an MP has warned. George Freeman pledges to fight decision to cancel local elections 22 January 2026 George Freeman opposes the Government’s decision to postpone the local elections scheduled for May 2026.
